creator: matthias.pfaller@familie-pfaller.de
text:
Hi,

thanks for the effort. I did a "make update" in /usr/local/ports this morning. I noticed that there is a calibre-7.1.0_1 and hoped the issue would just go away after upgrading :-/. I just did a forced rebuild (and reinstall) of py39-html5-parser and py39-beautiful-soup. This did not help :-(. 

zork$ pkg info -f calibre py39-beautifulsoup py39-html5-parser
calibre-7.1.0_1
Name           : calibre
Version        : 7.1.0_1
Installed on   : Tue Nov 28 11:30:22 2023 CET
Origin         : deskutils/calibre
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : python deskutils
Licenses       : GPLv3
Maintainer     : madpilot@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://calibre-ebook.com/
Comment        : Ebook management application
Shared Libs required:
        libxkbcommon.so.0
        libuchardet.so.0
        libstemmer.so.0
        libpython3.9.so.1.0
        libpodofo.so.2
        libmtp.so.9
        libicuuc.so.74
        libicuio.so.74
        libicui18n.so.74
        libicudata.so.74
        libhyphen.so.0
        libhunspell-1.7.so.0
        libfreetype.so.6
        libQt6Widgets.so.6
        libQt6Gui.so.6
        libQt6Core.so.6
        libOpenGL.so.0
        libGLX.so.0
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1302001
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : Synth
Flat size      : 61.0MiB
Description    :
Calibre is meant to be a complete e-library solution and thus includes
library management, format conversion, news feeds to ebook conversion,
as well as e-book reader sync features and an integrated e-book viewer.
py39-beautifulsoup-4.12.2
Name           : py39-beautifulsoup
Version        : 4.12.2
Installed on   : Tue Nov 21 08:06:18 2023 CET
Origin         : www/py-beautifulsoup
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:*
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : www python
Licenses       : MIT
Maintainer     : wen@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://www.crummy.com/software/BeautifulSoup/
Comment        : HTML/XML Parser for Python
Annotations    :
        flavor         : py39
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : Synth
Flat size      : 1.30MiB
Description    :
Beautiful Soup parses arbitrarily invalid XML- or HTML-like substance
into a tree representation. It provides methods and Pythonic idioms
that make it easy to search and modify the tree.

A well-formed XML/HTML document will yield a well-formed data
structure. An ill-formed XML/HTML document will yield a
correspondingly ill-formed data structure. If your document is only
locally well-formed, you can use this library to find and process the
well-formed part of it. The BeautifulSoup class has heuristics for
obtaining a sensible parse tree in the face of common HTML errors.
py39-html5-parser-0.4.12
Name           : py39-html5-parser
Version        : 0.4.12
Installed on   : Mon Nov 27 07:52:39 2023 CET
Origin         : www/py-html5-parser
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : www python
Licenses       : APACHE20
Maintainer     : madpilot@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://html5-parser.readthedocs.io/
Comment        : Fast implementation of the HTML 5 parsing spec for Python
Shared Libs required:
        libxml2.so.2
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1302001
        flavor         : py39
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : Synth
Flat size      : 495KiB
Description    :
A fast implementation of the HTML 5 parsing spec for Python. Parsing
is done in C using a variant of the gumbo parser. The gumbo parse
tree is then transformed into an lxml tree, also in C, yielding
parse times that can be a thirtieth of the html5lib parse times.
That is a speedup of 30x. This differs, for instance, from the gumbo
python bindings, where the initial parsing is done in C but the
transformation into the final tree is done in python.
zork$ ls -l /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/html5_parser/soup.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  4227 Mar 17  2022 /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/html5_parser/soup.py
